---
name: documentation
description: "Update project documentation based on code and project changes. Includes keywords to identify documentation tasks."
---

# Documentation Update Skill

## Purpose
Use this skill to update or generate documentation after project changes, ensuring docs stay aligned with the current codebase and architecture.

## When to use
- After implementing new features
- After changing architecture or folder structure
- After updating APIs, components, or state management
- When documentation is stale or inconsistent with code

## Workflow
1. Review the project changes or task context.
2. Identify affected documentation areas: README, TODO, architecture notes, component docs, workflow guides.
3. Determine the best documentation output: summary, feature description, usage example, or update note.
4. Generate clear, concise documentation that matches project conventions.
5. Verify the documentation reflects the current code and does not contradict implementation.

## Keywords
- documentation
- docs update
- README
- architecture
- feature notes
- changelog

## Example prompts
- "Update the documentation for the new inventory form feature."
- "Sync the README and project notes with the latest state management changes."
- "Generate documentation for the new outlet page and API integration."
